name: The Panel Remake
short_description: The Panel Remake is a puzzle game where you will turn valves, pull levers and push buttons. Start interacting with the panel elements and found the combinations to make it work. Then you can make it out of the room you get locked in.
detailed_description:
The Panel Remake is a puzzle game where you will turn valves, pull levers and push buttons.

It's an escape room game, where you interact with a panel, complete puzzles and make your way to the exit.

Start interacting with the panel elements and find the combinations. So maybe, if you discover how that panel works, you will be able to make it out.

FEATURES

  • 18 puzzles to discover and achieve
  • Available on Windows, Mac and Linux
  • Steam achievements
